description: End-to-end ML pipeline predicting flash flood probability at 1km x 1km resolution across Singapore, 1-6 hours ahead, using NEA rainfall data and LLM-extracted flood event labels.
methodology_basis: Adapted from Groundsource paper (Google Research, 2026) — news article LLM extraction applied to Singapore-specific sources.

data_sources.description: Straits Times newspaper flood event articles (Singapore)
PUB Singapore flood alert Telegram channel messages
NEA 5-minute rainfall readings at ~60 weather stations across Singapore

columns.grid_cell_id: string — unique ID for 1km x 1km grid cell
columns.flood: int (0 or 1) — 1 if a verified flood event occurs within next 6 hours at this cell

feature_schema.interpolation_method: Inverse Distance Weighting (IDW), search radius 10km, min 2 stations

pages: flood_map — Interactive Singapore flood probability choropleth
event_browser — Historical verified flood event table + map
model_dashboard — AUC-ROC, PR curve, feature importance
rainfall_explorer — NEA station time-series with flood overlays

api_key_policy.git_protection: pre-commit hook scanning for sk- patterns
